subject: An armored centaur-like figure channels golden magical energy with outstretched arms in a courtyard setting
description: A powerfully built humanoid figure — appearing centaur-like or mounted, with a lower body that merges into a large quadruped form — stands in an open courtyard with arching stonework and leafy vines overhead. The figure extends both arms outward, with golden magical chains or ribbons of energy spiraling from the hands and trailing through the air. The figure wears layered armor with decorative embossing and a white tunic beneath. The overall color palette is warm amber and gold against a bright, soft background of stone and green foliage. The figure's posture radiates authority and control.
foreground: armored centaur-like figure channeling golden energy with both arms extended
background: sunlit stone courtyard with arched columns and vines
emotion: composed authority — arms spread, expression calm and commanding
